isolation.unit: one official question per harness invocation
isolation.tenant: fresh packaged-CLI tenant per Memory instance
isolation.scope: fresh UUID per Memory instance, enforced by the tenant-admin REST principal and request scope
isolation.shared_haystack_reuse: rejected by the adapter's single-question invariant

proof.pairing: query fails unless synchronous reflect consumes every retained state and trace tenant/scope/actor/context/citations exactly match recall

execution_matrix.pairing: Within every domain/tier cell, both arms must use identical question IDs, reader contract, judge contract, and context ceiling; all questions must complete without errors.

packaged_fixture_dry_run.command: MEMPHANT_LME_PACKAGED_INTEGRATION=1 MEMPHANT_SCRATCH_ACTIVE=1 bash scripts/with_scratch_db.sh postgres://memphant:memphant@localhost:5432/memphant MEMPHANT_TEST_DATABASE_URL python3 -m pytest tests/test_public_benchmark_adapters.py::test_memphant_memory_tiny_packaged_rest_dry_run -q
